title: Better Iron Golem
description: Makes the iron golems texture have more vines and a better face!
body:
Ever wanted the iron golem to look a bit better? Well then this pack is the pack for you!

This pack makes the iron golem look more viney, and even changes the face to make it look less tired!

Includes:
- More realistic looking vines
- No more eye bags
- Better eyes

NOTE: if you see an incompatible pack error, just ignore it. This pack is made for versions 1.21.8 and up.
